{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Death aura
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Death aura]] is a type of [[aura]] that [[Jai Daishou]] has learned to see.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The tunnel crawled with death [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
